summary: Comprehensive testing of X12 EDI Parser implementation. All backend APIs working correctly (25/25 tests passed). Frontend EDI Management page fully functional with Upload & Validate, Generate 835, and Transaction Log tabs.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 parses X12 envelope (sender_id, receiver_id, control_number)
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 parses members with maintenance types (addition/cancellation/reinstatement)
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 extracts DMG segment (gender, DOB)
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 extracts DTP*348 effective date
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 extracts HD coverage type (health/dental/vision)
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-834 handles pipe-delimited fallback
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/upload-834 creates/updates members from X12
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/upload-834 returns created/updated/terminated counts
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/upload-834 handles pipe-delimited fallback
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-837 parses X12 envelope
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-837 parses claims with provider info (NM1*85 billing provider)
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-837 extracts HI diagnosis codes with ICD-10 decimal insertion
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-837 extracts SV1 service lines with modifiers
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/validate-837 handles pipe-delimited fallback
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/upload-837 creates claims via adjudication pipeline
✅ Backend: POST /api/edi/upload-837 returns envelope info
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/generate-835 generates X12 format with ISA/GS/ST/BPR segments
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/generate-835?format=pipe generates pipe-delimited format
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/generate-835 returns claim count
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/generate-835 includes CLP/SVC segments for claims
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/transactions returns transaction history list
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/transactions has required fields (type, status, record_count, filename)
✅ Backend: GET /api/edi/transactions filters by tx_type
✅ Backend: 834 parser handles INS maintenance type 024 (cancellation)
✅ Backend: 834 parser handles INS maintenance type 025 (reinstatement)
✅ Frontend: EDI Management page (/edi) renders with page title
✅ Frontend: Upload & Validate tab visible with 834 and 837 upload cards
✅ Frontend: 834 upload card has file input, Preview button, Upload & Process button
✅ Frontend: 837 upload card has file input, Preview button, Upload & Process button
✅ Frontend: Generate 835 tab has date range inputs, format select, generate button
✅ Frontend: Transaction Log tab shows history with type badges, status, control numbers
✅ Frontend: Transaction Log shows 11 existing transactions
✅ Frontend: EDI Management nav item appears in sidebar under Operations
✅ Frontend: Reports page has EDI Interchange section with 'Go to EDI Management' shortcut link
seed_data_creation: Test EDI files created in /app/test_data/ (sample_834.edi, sample_837.edi, sample_834_pipe.txt, sample_837_pipe.txt). Backend tests uploaded X12 files creating test members (TESTMBR01, PIPEMBR01, PIPEMBR02) and claims.
context_for_next_testing_agent: X12 EDI Parser fully tested. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/edi/validate-834 parses X12 834 with envelope info, member list, maintenance types (021=addition, 024=cancellation, 025=reinstatement), relationship codes, DMG gender/DOB, DTP effective dates, HD coverage types. 2) POST /api/edi/upload-834 processes X12 and creates/updates/terminates members with audit trail. 3) POST /api/edi/validate-837 parses X12 837 with envelope info, claims, NM1*85 billing provider, NM1*IL subscriber, HI diagnosis codes with ICD-10 decimal insertion, SV1 service lines with modifiers. 4) POST /api/edi/upload-837 creates claims via adjudication pipeline. 5) GET /api/edi/generate-835 generates compliant X12 835 with ISA/GS/ST/BPR/CLP/SVC/CAS/AMT segments or pipe-delimited format. 6) GET /api/edi/transactions returns transaction history with type, status, record_count, errors. 7) Frontend EDI Management page at /edi with Upload & Validate, Generate 835, Transaction Log tabs. 8) Reports page has EDI Interchange shortcut to /edi.
